case_title: MAGIC WOOD FLOORS VS. GIORGIO ARCE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAGIC WOOD FLOORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARCE, GIORGIO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.00, DEFENDANT REQUESTED ADDITIONAL WORK FOR WHICH COMPENSATION IS OWED, BUT I OFFSET THE AWARD BECAUSE I CREDIT DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY THAT THE WORK PLAINTIFF PERFORMED WAS NOT AS PLAINTIFF PROMISED AS TO THE BASEBOARDS AND THE TRANSITIONS TO LINOLEUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR BOWLUS, ROSEBELLE AS ATTORNEY FOR ARCE, GIORGIO

MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2019 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED AT 10:15 AM IN DEPT. 318, JUDGE KIESSELBACH. PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATION FOR THIS MATTER TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. (206)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2019 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. ROBERT STUMPF; CLERK: CRAIG BLACKSTONE; NOT REPORTED. (D. 525)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2019 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE: CHARLENE PADOVANI KIESSELBACH, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D318)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MAGIC WOOD FLOORS RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ARCE, GIORGIO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.00, BOTH SIDES WAIVE VENUE.
